channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Building waste dumped on pavement, 9th June
item.description:
Black bags and misc building waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Blendon Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight column 44P22 on Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst, BR7 is damaged and needs replacing, 8th June
item.description:
Streetlight column 44P22 on Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst, BR7 was completely destroyed by a large oak tree coming down over the road a few weeks ago and needs to be replaced with a new column to light up this dark area on the footpath.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked car, 8th June
item.description:
Car part on pavement blocking way for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marathon Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked car, 8th June
item.description:
Car parts on pavement blocking way for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marathon Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight column 44P9 on Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst BR7 is not working, 8th June
item.description:
Streetlight column 44P9 on Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst BR7 is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prince Imperial Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Alleyway that leads into my garden-No maintenance done here, 8th June
item.description:
I live on a row of maisonettes and those that have first floor maisonettes have their gardens round the back, so in order for us to access our gardens, we need to come out of our front door, turn into an alleyway and everyone’s garden is accessible from there. As you can say, the strip/alleyway leading up to the gardens have not been maintained. There’s grass, weeds and rubbish everywhere which haven’t been looked at or cleared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marina Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chichester Road NW6 TOP END, 8th June
item.description:
Again Street needs Sweeping BADLY. What has happened to Streetcare? LITTER around These Roads is Getting WORSE.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along Kerb Outside 91 Canterbury Road NW6, 8th June
item.description:
Litter all along the kerb from 91, 93 Canterbury Road NW6 it’s LITTER that has been there for WEEKS. It’s NOT being Swept. WHY?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Terrace, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 123 Granville Road, NW6 5AR, 8th June
item.description:
Fridge and other Items. Needs Removing ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Outside 153 Granville Road, NW6 5AR, 8th June
item.description:
Overfull Recycle Bins and Mattresses and Bed frame and Head Board NEED REMOVING ASAP.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Wheelie bins, 8th June
item.description:
How much more times do I need to report this problem you Keep saying that you have spoken to the residents or written a letter to them This needs enforcement now 199 brook Street Northumberland heath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horrendous road surface - over 12 months unrepaired, 8th June
item.description:
I cannot believe that this road has been left in this state for so many months (over a year) Not only is it a bus route but very heavily used by cyclists - this is worse than a gravel track

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Brecknock Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Portable toilet, 8th June
item.description:
Resident on corner of Highfield ave/collindale ave had a party over the weekend these portable toilet was on there property at the time now the party has finished they have dumped these blue portable toilets on the public highways Grass verge outside the property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highfield Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 69 Tottenham Court Road W1, 8th June
item.description:
There is a water leak in the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Tottenham Court Road, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Goodge Street station, 8th June
item.description:
The light is not working. Please can it be fixed? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chenies Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Glen House. Opposite KFC, 8th June
item.description:
The street light is not working. Cannot be fixed please? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chenies Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing bench, 8th June
item.description:
The bench outside Victoria Park, opposite the bowling green, was removed. When will it be replaced? Or why is it not being replaced? Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ballards Lane, Church End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping ( Millstream Road ), 8th June
item.description:
Fly- tipped furniture ( Wooden chest and chair) left discarded on the pavement on Millstream Road under the railway bridge ( Bermondsey). Please remove asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and boxes, 8th June

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain has sunk slightly and a hole has appeared near no entry sign, 8th June
item.description:
I have noticed this before but don't know why I thought more about it this time! It could be a trip hazard for people or a small child could get it's foot caught in the hole?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 126, Horsa Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
